Who is responsible for the farm data?
How many farms are in the program this year?
Which criteria are the most difficult?
Hi Chantal. Before the audit, I have a few questions. Who is responsible for the farm data in Rwanda?
Hi Carlos. Our field team is responsible for the data.
Good. How many farms are in the program this year?
There are one hundred and twenty farms in our region.
And how often do you verify the properties?
We verify them twice a year. Now I have a question for you. Where are your farms located?
They are in the south of Minas Gerais, near Varginha. Are your producers ready for the audit?
Most are ready, but a few farms need more documents.

Let me read the questions on my meeting agenda. First, who is responsible for the farm data this year? Second, how many farms are in the program in the Rwanda region? Third, how often does the team verify the properties? Fourth, which criteria are the most difficult for the producers? And fifth, are the farms ready for the next audit? These questions help me understand the progress and the concerns of each team before we make a decision. Good questions keep everyone on the same topic.

Hi Carlos, this is Chantal from the Sucafina team in Rwanda. Thank you for your questions. Here is some information for the meeting. In our region, there are one hundred and twenty farms in the program this year. We verify the properties twice a year. Most producers are ready for the audit, but a few farms need more documents. I also have a question for you. How often does your team in Brazil check the data? And who is responsible for the final report? See you at the meeting. Thank you, Carlos.

First, who is responsible for the farm data? Second, how many farms are in the program this year? Third, how often do you verify the properties? Fourth, which criteria are the most difficult? Finally, are the producers ready for the audit?
